title: Beginner's Guide to Vice City
summary: Everything new players need to know before stepping into GTA 6's Vice City — controls, mechanics, and first missions.
content:
Welcome to Vice City

GTA 6 drops you into the sun-soaked streets of Vice City with little hand-holding. This guide covers the essential mechanics, early missions, and tips to get you started on the right foot.

Basic Controls

Movement and combat controls have been significantly updated from GTA 5. The new cover system is more fluid, and melee combat now features a combo system.

Your First Hour

Focus on completing the prologue missions to unlock free roam. Visit the safehouse to save your progress and customize your loadout.
author: The GTA Vault

title: Best Money-Making Methods in GTA 6
summary: Maximize your GTA$ earnings with these proven strategies — from heists to businesses to stock market plays.
content:
Top Earning Methods

Making money in GTA 6 is all about diversifying your income streams. Here are the top methods ranked by earnings per hour.

1. The Diamond Casino Heist

The highest-paying single activity in the game, netting up to $2.5M per successful run with a skilled crew.

2. Business Empire

Invest in nightclubs, car dealerships, and restaurants. Passive income stacks up quickly once you own multiple properties.
author: The GTA Vault

title: All Collectible Locations in GTA 6
summary: Complete map of every hidden package, action figure, and secret collectible across Vice City and Leonida.
content:
Collectible Overview

GTA 6 features over 200 collectibles spread across Vice City and the surrounding Leonida countryside. Finding them all unlocks exclusive rewards and achievements.

Hidden Packages (50)

A callback to the original Vice City, hidden packages are scattered across rooftops, underwater locations, and hard-to-reach areas.

Action Figures (30)

Small figurines based on in-game characters, hidden throughout interiors and outdoor locations.
author: The GTA Vault
